visual_description: A man in a dark suit and glasses is seen in close-up, looking downward with his head slightly tilted, while holding a lit cigarette near his mouth. Another person, partially visible and out of focus, stands beside him, their face obscured. The scene is dimly lit with blue tones, emphasizing the smoke rising from the cigarette and the man’s focused posture.
